title: Ukrainian Potatoes Dumplings
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring peppery and crumbly potatoes, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with the added flavors of paprika and steam, and can be served with raw ingredients on the side.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, flour, paprika, black pepper, and salt, and mix well.
Add the egg to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and carefully add the dumplings to the pot.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve hot with melted butter and chopped fresh dill on top.
Serve with a side of raw vegetables, such as carrots or cucumbers, if desired.
